name: Reflex Plus Dog Alutray Mini Small Breed Beef InGravy 85g
shortDescription: Alu-tray is a nutritious wet food with high-quality animal protein and a variety of vitamins. It offers multisystemic benefits due to its functional components. With its high water content, it supports the body's daily water intake and contributes to kidney health. Additionall...
